description: April-May 2021 market top correction prior to major breakdown.
May-July 2021 consolidation and clean corrective breakdown before reversal to new highs.
Late 2020 consolidation phase leading to a major breakout rally.
January-June 2026 corrective wave where Wave B retraced 60.1% of Wave A, followed by a Wave C impulse drop down to $59,108.92.
